question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: List out the account numbers of clients who are youngest and have highest average salary?  If the person A's birthdate < B's birthdate, it means that person B is younger than person A; A11 refers to average salary
orig_masked: List out the [C1] of [T3] who are [C9] and have highest [C18]?  If the [T3] A's [C9] < B's [C9], it means that [T3] B is [C9] than [T3] A; [C18] refers to [C18]
orig_evidence: If the person A's birthdate < B's birthdate, it means that person B is younger than person A; A11 refers to average salary
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.account_id  FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id INNER JOIN district AS T4 on T4.district_id = T1.district_id WHERE T2.client_id = ( SELECT client_id FROM client ORDER BY birth_date DESC LIMIT 1) GROUP BY T4.A11, T1.account_id

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Among the superheroes with blue eyes, how many of them have the super power of "Agility"?  blue eyes refers to colour = 'Blue' and eye_colour_id = colour.id; super power of "Agility" refers to power_name = 'Agility'
orig_masked: Among the [T9] with [V2] [C19], how many of them have the [T10] of "[V1]"?  [V2] [C19] refers to [C5] = '[V2]' and [C19] = [C6]; [T10] of "[V1]" refers to [C31] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C31]; [V2] is a value of the column [C5]
orig_evidence: blue eyes refers to colour = 'Blue' and eye_colour_id = colour.id; super power of "Agility" refers to power_name = 'Agility'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id INNER JOIN colour AS T4 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T4.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Agility' AND T4.colour = 'Blue'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: List the patient ID, sex and birthday who has abnormal white blood cell count. Group them by sex and list the patient by age in ascending order.  abnormal white blood cell count refers to WBC < = 3.5 or WBC > = 9.0;
orig_masked: List the [C63], [C64] and [C59] who has [C57]. Group them by [C64] and list the [T3] by [C59] in ascending order.  [C57] refers to [C57] < = [V1] or [C57] > = [V2];; [V1] is a value of the column [C57]; [V2] is a value of the column [C57]
orig_evidence: abnormal white blood cell count refers to WBC < = 3.5 or WBC > = 9.0;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.WBC <= 3.5 OR T2.WBC >= 9.0 GROUP BY T1.SEX,T1.ID ORDER BY T1.Birthday ASC

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the percentage of the female patient whose uric acid (UA) beyond the normal range? uric acid (UA) beyond the normal range refers to UA > 8.0 and SEX = 'M' or UA > 6.5 and SEX = 'F'; female refers to Sex = 'F'
orig_masked: What is the percentage of the [C64] [T3] whose [C55] beyond the [C55]? [C55] beyond the [C55] refers to [C55] > [V2] and [C64] = '[V4]' or [C55] > [V1] and [C64] = '[V3]'; [C64] refers to [C64] = '[V3]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C55]; [V2] is a value of the column [C55]; [V3] is a value of the column [C64]; [V4] is a value of the column [C55]
orig_evidence: uric acid (UA) beyond the normal range refers to UA > 8.0 and SEX = 'M' or UA > 6.5 and SEX = 'F'; female refers to Sex = 'F'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.UA > 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: List the heroes' names whose eyes and hair colours are both black.  heroes' names refers to superhero_name; eyes and hair colours are both black refers to eye_colour_id AND hair_colour_id WHERE colour.colour = 'Black';
orig_masked: List the [T9]' [C28] whose [C19] and [C22] are both [V1].  [T9]' [C28] refers to [C28]; [C19] and [C22] are both [V1] refers to [C19] AND [C22] WHERE [C5].[C5] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C5]
orig_evidence: heroes' names refers to superhero_name; eyes and hair colours are both black refers to eye_colour_id AND hair_colour_id WHERE colour.colour = 'Black';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id AND T1.hair_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Black'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many patients who underwent testing in 1997 had protein levels outside the normal range? underwent testing in 1997 refers to YEAR(DATE) = '1997'; protein levels within the normal range refers to tp > 6 and tp < 8.5
orig_masked: How many [T2] who underwent [T2] in [V1] had [C14]? underwent [T2] in [V1] refers to YEAR(DATE) = '[V1]'; [C14] refers to [C14] > [V3] and [C14] < [V2]; [V1] is a value of the column [C23]; [V2] is a value of the column [C14]; [V3] is a value of the column [C14]
orig_evidence: underwent testing in 1997 refers to YEAR(DATE) = '1997'; protein levels within the normal range refers to tp > 6 and tp < 8.5
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Laboratory WHERE (ALB <= 6.0 OR ALB >= 8.5) AND STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '1997'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Among the accounts who have loan validity more than 12 months, list out the accounts that have the highest approved amount and have account opening date in 1993. Loan validity more than 12 months refers to duration > 12
orig_masked: Among the [T1] who have [C36] more than [V1], list out the [T1] that have the highest [C34] and have [T1] [C2] in [V2]. [C36] more than [V1] refers to [C36] > 12; [V1] is a value of the column [C36]; [V2] is a value of the column [C2]
orig_evidence: Loan validity more than 12 months refers to duration > 12
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.account_id FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) = '1993' AND T1.duration > 12 ORDER BY T1.amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Rank heroes published by Marvel Comics by their height in descending order. name refers to superhero_name; the tallest hero refers to MAX(height_cm); published by Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
orig_masked: Rank [T9] [C15] by [V1] by their [C23] in descending order. [C28] refers to [C28]; the [C23] [T9] refers to MAX([C23]); [C15] by [V1] refers to [C15] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C15]
orig_evidence: name refers to superhero_name; the tallest hero refers to MAX(height_cm); published by Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT superhero_name, height_cm, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY height_cm DESC) AS HeightRank FROM superhero INNER JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id WHERE publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the disease name of the patient who has the highest level of triglyceride within the normal range?  disease name referse to Diagnosis; highest level of triglyceride within the normal range refers to MAX(TG < 200);
orig_masked: What is the [C6] of the [T3] who has the highest [C52]?  [C6] referse to [C6]; highest [C52] refers to MAX([C52] < [V1]);; [V1] is a value of the column [C52]
orig_evidence: disease name referse to Diagnosis; highest level of triglyceride within the normal range refers to MAX(TG < 200);
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG < 200 ORDER BY T2.TG DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the highest anti-nucleus antibody concentration level of a patient with a normal creatinine level? highest anti-nucleus antibody concentration level refers to MAX(ANA); normal creatinine level refers to CRE < 1.5;
orig_masked: What is the highest [C5] of a [T3] with a [C21]? highest [C5] refers to MAX([C5]); [C21] refers to [C21] < [V1];; [V1] is a value of the column [C21]
orig_evidence: highest anti-nucleus antibody concentration level refers to MAX(ANA); normal creatinine level refers to CRE < 1.5;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.ANA FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE T3.CRE < 1.5 ORDER BY T2.ANA DESC LIMIT 1
